name: The Other Half
overview: For a new identity that guarantees his son Mansour to enter school and seek a safe life away from the pursuit of the English colonizer. The script is forced to gather his team, get back into trouble and work with the Germans as a spy against the British, taking advantage of the hostility between the two sides in 1942 when Egypt was one of the battlefields of World War II.
